case_title: GRIFFIN, SUSAN S. RECEIVER FOR MATSONIA GARDENS,IN vs. KIRWAN, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION. WRITTEN STIP. SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRWAN, STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 825 POST ST, APT.#501 - S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUL-14-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. FAILS TO VACATE & REMOVE POSSESSIONS BY 7-14-93, PL BY EXPARTE APPL. MAY MOVE FOR AMEND MONETARY JUDGMENT FOR AMOUNT PRAYED FOR IN COMPLAINT. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
